title: Corporate Social Responsibility - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Corporate Social Responsibility
Home > About us > Corporate Social Responsibility

## Diversity and Inclusion
- The day-to-day practice of law at Green & Spiegel involves global mobility and bringing people from all around the world to Canada to work and to live. Green & Spiegel support multiculturalism and diversity in the work that we do and how we do it.
- We owe our success to the extremely talented team of dedicated lawyers, immigration consultants, law clerks and immigration case analysts who make us look good every day. Many of the people at Green & Spiegel are immigrants themselves, are fluent in more than 30 different languages, and have first-hand knowledge of the challenges faced by people who are transferred to work in Canada on a short-term basis as well as the challenges of becoming a new Canadian.
- Green & Spiegel maintain a formal human rights/diversity policy for their legal workplace addressing fair recruitment, retention and advancement.
- Since its inception, Green & Spiegel has provided pro bono services to a large variety of clients.
